creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to FreeBSD from comment #7)
> I can't say that is the first time I have seen that happen. While the size
> and commit checksums mismatch, diff doesn't find any file changes between
> the old tarball and the current one.

I just took a look at github.
Commit 9a93777 is marked 0.9.6 release while the newer commit 71ec7c5 has the log entry "Version bump to 0.9.6.1", see
https://github.com/hydrogen-music/hydrogen/commits/0.9.6
So some change in tarball content and size is expected.

On a side note: In fact it would be a desaster for the whole cryptographic commit chain argument in git if it was possible to just change commit IDs on existing commits without changing some content (incl meta-info) as well.

> The updated patch differs only in the distinfo and GH_COMMIT

It builds fine on 10.x but I get this on 9.3:

[ 11%] Building CXX object src/core/CMakeFiles/hydrogen-core-0.9.6.dir/src/basics/song.cpp.o
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/.build/src/core && /usr/bin/c++   -Dhydrogen_core_0_9_6_EXPORTS -O2 -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include/raptor2 -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include/raptor2 -fPIC -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/hydrogen-music-hydrogen-71ec7c5/src/core/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/hydrogen-music-hydrogen-71ec7c5/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/.build/src/core/include -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtDeclarative -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtXml -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtSql -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtOpenGL -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtNetwork -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtXmlPatterns -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtWebKit -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtHelp -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtScript -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtSvg -I/usr/local/include/qt4/Qt3Support -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtGui -I/usr/local/include/qt4/QtCore -I/usr/local/share/qt4/mkspecs/default -I/usr/local/include/qt4 -I/usr/local/include -o CMakeFiles/hydrogen-core-0.9.6.dir/src/basics/song.cpp.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/hydrogen-music-hydrogen-71ec7c5/src/core/src/basics/song.cpp
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/hydrogen-music-hydrogen-71ec7c5/src/core/src/basics/drumkit.cpp: In static member function 'static bool H2Core::Drumkit::install(const QString&)':
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/hydrogen/work/hydrogen-music-hydrogen-71ec7c5/src/core/src/basics/drumkit.cpp:302: error: 'archive_read_support_filter_all' was not declared in this scope
*** [src/core/CMakeFiles/hydrogen-core-0.9.6.dir/src/basics/drumkit.cpp.o] Error code 1

Looks like some namespace/include issue. Could you take a look?
